name: CRISPR Cloning Workflow Designer
description: Guided wet-lab simulation tool for three CRISPR guide-cloning workflows: TypeIISOligoCloning (BbsI/BsmBI/BsaI annealed-oligo ligation), RestrictionLigation (e.g. SpeI for pTargetF), and GibsonAssembly (overlap-based seamless assembly). If all required inputs are present the tool designs oligos/primers and returns results (status='ready'). If inputs are missing it returns a structured 'needs_user_input' response with human-readable questions instead of an error. Known vectors: px330, lenticrispr_v2, pdr274, pcrispr, ptargetf, px458_gibson, pet28a, pbr322. Pass vector='custom' to design with any other vector.

inputs.name: vector
inputs.description: Vector name. Known presets: px330, lenticrispr_v2, pdr274, pcrispr, ptargetf, px458_gibson, pet28a, pbr322. Pass 'custom' to design with a vector not in this list. If omitted and organism/target_reference is supplied, a default is chosen automatically (ecoli_rpsl → pcrispr).

inputs.name: cloning_method
inputs.description: Required when vector='custom'. One of: TypeIISOligoCloning, RestrictionLigation, GibsonAssembly. Inferred automatically from known vector presets.

inputs.name: protospacer
inputs.description: The target DNA protospacer sequence (20 bp for SpCas9/SaCas9, 23 bp for Cas12a). A/T/G/C only. Required for TypeIISOligoCloning.

inputs.name: top_overhang
inputs.description: 5' overhang for the top-strand oligo, left by the Type IIS enzyme digest. Required for vector='custom' with TypeIISOligoCloning. Inferred from preset vectors (e.g. CACC for pX330).

inputs.name: bottom_overhang
inputs.description: 5' overhang for the bottom-strand oligo. Required for vector='custom' with TypeIISOligoCloning. Inferred from preset vectors (e.g. AAAC for pX330).

inputs.name: prepend_g
inputs.description: Override for whether to prepend a 5' G to the protospacer when it does not already start with G. If omitted, the preset vector's u6_prefers_5prime_g setting controls this.

inputs.name: enzyme
inputs.description: Restriction enzyme name. Required for vector='custom'. Inferred from preset vectors.

inputs.name: scaffold_in_vector
inputs.description: Whether the sgRNA scaffold is already encoded in the vector. Required for vector='custom' with TypeIISOligoCloning.

inputs.name: promoter
inputs.description: Promoter driving guide RNA expression (e.g. U6, H1, T7, J23119). Required for vector='custom' with TypeIISOligoCloning.

inputs.name: u6_prefers_5prime_g
inputs.description: Whether to prefer a 5' G for promoter compatibility. Required for vector='custom' with TypeIISOligoCloning when promoter context is unknown.

inputs.name: guide_cassette_sequence
inputs.description: Full guide cassette DNA sequence (promoter + spacer + scaffold if scaffold is not in vector). Required for RestrictionLigation. A/T/G/C only.

inputs.name: restriction_site_sequence
inputs.description: Restriction enzyme recognition sequence to add to PCR primer 5' tails (e.g. ACTAGT for SpeI). Required for vector='custom' with RestrictionLigation. Inferred from preset vectors.

inputs.name: insert_sequence
inputs.description: Insert sequence for Gibson assembly (without overlap regions — overlaps are computed from the context). Required for GibsonAssembly. A/T/G/C only.

inputs.name: left_overlap_context
inputs.description: Vector sequence immediately 5' of the Gibson insertion site. Provide at least 20–30 bp. Required for GibsonAssembly.

inputs.name: right_overlap_context
inputs.description: Vector sequence immediately 3' of the Gibson insertion site. Provide at least 20–30 bp. Required for GibsonAssembly.

inputs.name: overlap_bp
inputs.description: Gibson overlap length in bp. Defaults to the vector preset's recommended_overlap_bp (usually 20). Only needed to override the default.

inputs.name: organism
inputs.description: Optional organism name or alias for target verification. Supported local references: E. coli (ecoli_rpsl). If supplied, the protospacer must be found in the local reference.

inputs.name: target_reference
inputs.description: Explicit local reference key for target verification. Supported: ecoli_rpsl.

inputs.name: construct_name
inputs.description: Optional name for the final construct, used in construction_file_inputs.

outputs.description: Direct return object. If status='ready': design result with cloning_method, vector, enzyme, citations, workflow-specific oligos/primers, target_verification, and construction_file_inputs (compatible with create_construction_file sequence_build mode, assembly_strategy='DirectSynthesis'). If status='needs_user_input': structured dict with missing_fields and human-readable questions.
